text.title: FinOps INFORM Phase — Cost Visibility Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Tags exist but coverage 30%; chargeback impossible.
antipattern.fix: Promote to mandatory; enforce at provisioning via policy engine.

antipattern.symptom: Finance maintains a shared sheet to allocate; drift constant.
antipattern.fix: Replace with cost dashboard refreshed daily, sourced from CUR.

antipattern.symptom: Team celebrates 20% savings; CEO points out users dropped 30%.
Org jumps to rightsizing on noisy data; saves nothing.
antipattern.fix: Gate OPTIMIZE on INFORM completion (≥80% coverage).
